lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Halt! Are you here to sabotage the Motherlode Mine?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Prospector Percy discovered unusual mineral veins in this cave. Now he's built a machine to let us extract useful ores.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Percy calls it the Motherlode. I don't know why, and I'm not asking - that's between him and his mother.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Dwarves don't normally let humans claim areas of the mine like this, but Percy's machine is really useful, so we struck a deal.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: That's a relief. Have a nice day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What would you do if I said 'yes'?
